testcase.name: test_live_promotion_blocked_without_governance

failure.message: AssertionError: assert <LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'> in {<LifecycleState.PAPER: 'PAPER'>, <LifecycleState.CANDIDATE: 'CANDIDATE'>} + where <LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'> = LifecycleSnapshot(strategy_id='G1', state=<LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'>, since=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 10, 43, 20, 193795), version='v1').state

testcase.failure:
def test_live_promotion_blocked_without_governance(): engine = LifecycleEngine()
snapshot = LifecycleSnapshot( strategy_id="G1", state=LifecycleState.PAPER, since=datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=10), version="v1", )
event, new_snapshot = engine.resolve( snapshot=snapshot, now=datetime.utcnow(), ssr_status=SSRStatus.STRONG, health_status=HealthStatus.HEALTHY, operator_override=None, # no approval )
# Promotion logic allowed only via governance pipeline > assert new_snapshot.state in { LifecycleState.PAPER, LifecycleState.CANDIDATE, } E AssertionError: assert <LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'> in {<LifecycleState.PAPER: 'PAPER'>, <LifecycleState.CANDIDATE: 'CANDIDATE'>} E + where <LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'> = LifecycleSnapshot(strategy_id='G1', state=<LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'>, since=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 10, 43, 20, 193795), version='v1').state
engine = <core.lifecycle.engine.LifecycleEngine object at 0x000001992BA51850> event = LifecycleEvent(strategy_id='G1', from_state=<LifecycleState.PAPER: 'PAPER'>, to_state=<LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'>, reason='SSR_STRONG', as_of=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 10, 43, 20, 193795)) new_snapshot = LifecycleSnapshot(strategy_id='G1', state=<LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'>, since=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 10, 43, 20, 193795), version='v1') snapshot = LifecycleSnapshot(strategy_id='G1', state=<LifecycleState.PAPER: 'PAPER'>, since=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 3, 10, 43, 20, 193795), version='v1')
tests\governance\test_governance_abuse_and_kill_switch.py:29: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_lifecycle_transition_emitted_once
testcase.failure:
def test_lifecycle_transition_emitted_once(): engine = LifecycleEngine()
snapshot = LifecycleSnapshot( strategy_id="S1", state=LifecycleState.PAPER, since=datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=5), version="v1", )
# First evaluation → eligibility event1, snap1 = engine.resolve( snapshot=snapshot, now=datetime.utcnow(), ssr_status=SSRStatus.STRONG, health_status=HealthStatus.HEALTHY, )
assert event1 is not None > assert snap1.state == LifecycleState.CANDIDATE E AssertionError: assert <LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'> == <LifecycleState.CANDIDATE: 'CANDIDATE'> E E #x1B[0m#x1B[91m- CANDIDATE#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E #x1B[92m+ LIVE#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m
engine = <core.lifecycle.engine.LifecycleEngine object at 0x000001992B7FBD90> event1 = LifecycleEvent(strategy_id='S1', from_state=<LifecycleState.PAPER: 'PAPER'>, to_state=<LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'>, reason='SSR_STRONG', as_of=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 10, 43, 21, 320208)) snap1 = LifecycleSnapshot(strategy_id='S1', state=<LifecycleState.LIVE: 'LIVE'>, since=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 13, 10, 43, 21, 320208), version='v1') snapshot = LifecycleSnapshot(strategy_id='S1', state=<LifecycleState.PAPER: 'PAPER'>, since=datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 8, 10, 43, 21, 320208), version='v1')
